code-review.intent: Add an optional Code Review agent operation — a structured, spec-anchored evaluation of code diffs covering task completeness, architectural conformance, security, correctness bugs, and code quality — producing an ephemeral advisory report with a merge verdict. Supports feature, fix, and tweak branches.

feat/code-review-subagent.intent: Write emergence/code-review.md subagent prompt and update SKILL.md with new Code Review operation, autonomy boundary, and Builder commands
